---
title: "Setup Overview"
---

This section documents the Google Cloud Platform (GCP) infrastructure and system setup used to support the SWFSC CoastWatch West Coast Node cloud environment.

The setup documentation is split into smaller pages so each phase of the migration can be read independently. Together, these pages cover Terraform-managed infrastructure, VM access, the ERDDAP serving environment, processing VM configuration, migration/recovery notes, and reusable workflow deployment templates.

```{=html}
<div class="file-grid">

  <div class="file-card">
    <h3>Cloud Infrastructure Setup</h3>
    <p>Terraform-managed VMs, buckets, service accounts, IAM bindings, disks, labels, and snapshot policies.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="gcp-infrastructure.html">Open cloud infrastructure setup</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="file-card">
    <h3>Accessing VMs</h3>
    <p>Connecting to ERDDAP and processing VMs with gcloud SSH, IAP tunneling, browser SSH, and local port forwarding.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="gcp-vm-access.html">Open VM access guide</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="file-card">
    <h3>ERDDAP VM Setup</h3>
    <p>Operating-system setup, persistent disk initialization, rclone-mounted GCS access, Tomcat, and ERDDAP installation.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="gcp-erddap-vm.html">Open ERDDAP VM setup</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="file-card">
    <h3>Processing VM Setup</h3>
    <p>Processing VM setup for development, testing, reprocessing, Python environments, Earthdata access, and external tools.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="gcp-processing-vm.html">Open processing VM setup</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="file-card">
    <h3>Migration, Upgrade, and Recovery</h3>
    <p>Optional data-preservation snapshots, rebuild notes, upgrade workflows, and cleanup steps used during cloud migration work.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="gcp-migration-recovery.html">Open migration and recovery notes</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="file-card">
    <h3>GCP Data Processing Templates</h3>
    <p>Reusable Cloud Run and processing VM project structures used to standardize workflow repositories and deployments.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="gcp-templates.html">Open processing templates</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>
```
